records.question: Which owners have a male dog named Bessie that arrived exactly on 2018-01-17 11:44:16 and was adopted on or before 2018-02-25 23:45:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT owners.owner_id FROM owners
JOIN dogs ON owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id AND owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id
JOIN breeds ON dogs.breed_code = breeds.breed_code
WHERE dogs.date_arrived = '2018-01-17 11:44:16' AND dogs.gender = '1' AND dogs.name = 'Bessie' AND dogs.date_adopted <= '2018-02-25 23:45:30'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.owner_id
FROM Owners o
JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id
WHERE d.name = 'Bessie'
AND d.gender = 'M'
AND d.date_arrived = '2018-01-17 11:44:16'
AND d.date_adopted <= '2018-02-25 23:45:30'

records.question: Which owners in Beerton with cell number 633.455.3045x85484 and home phone (094)747-5094x8134 have a dog named Betty that was not abandoned and left on or before 2018-03-25 15:05:16?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT owners.owner_id FROM owners
JOIN dogs ON owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id AND owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id
WHERE dogs.date_departed <= '2018-03-25 15:05:16' AND owners.cell_number = '633.455.3045x85484' AND owners.home_phone = '(094)747-5094x8134' AND dogs.name = 'Betty' AND owners.city = 'Beerton' AND dogs.abandoned_yn = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.owner_id
FROM Owners o
JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id
WHERE o.city = 'Beerton'
AND o.cell_number = '633.455.3045x85484'
AND o.home_phone = '(094)747-5094x8134'
AND d.name = 'Betty'
AND d.abandoned_yn != 'Y'
AND d.date_departed <= '2018-03-25 15:05:16'

records.question: Who owns a dog named Troy and lives in Arizona?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT owners.owner_id FROM owners
JOIN dogs ON owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id AND owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id
JOIN breeds ON dogs.breed_code = breeds.breed_code
WHERE owners.state = 'Arizona' AND dogs.name = 'Troy'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT o.owner_id
FROM Owners o
JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id
WHERE d.name = 'Troy' AND o.state = 'Arizona'

records.question: Which owners are located in Port Zackery?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT owners.owner_id FROM owners
WHERE owners.city = 'Port Zackery'
records.pred_sql: SELECT owner_id FROM Owners WHERE city = 'Port Zackery'

records.question: Which owners with the last name Rippin in Arizona have the cell number +70(4)9217952551, home phone 318-052-6573, and email margaretta.runte@example.net, and own dogs that weigh exactly 8.96, were adopted on or after 2018-03-18 07:47:40, and departed on 2018-03-25 04:42:14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT owners.owner_id FROM owners
JOIN dogs ON owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id AND owners.owner_id = dogs.owner_id
JOIN sizes ON dogs.size_code = sizes.size_code
WHERE owners.last_name = 'Rippin' AND owners.cell_number = '+70(4)9217952551' AND owners.email_address = 'margaretta.runte@example.net' AND dogs.weight = '8.96' AND owners.state = 'Arizona' AND owners.home_phone = '318-052-6573' AND dogs.date_departed = '2018-03-25 04:42:14' AND dogs.date_adopted >= '2018-03-18 07:47:40'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT o.owner_id
FROM Owners o
JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id
WHERE o.last_name = 'Rippin'
AND o.state = 'Arizona'
AND o.cell_number = '+70(4)9217952551'
AND o.home_phone = '318-052-6573'
AND o.email_address = 'margaretta.runte@example.net'
AND d.weight = '8.96'
AND d.date_adopted >= '2018-03-18 07:47:40'
AND d.date_departed = '2018-03-25 04:42:14'

records.question: Who is the owner named Jaclyn Stoltenberg with email address hudson.favian@example.com living at 2635 Caitlyn Plains in Barrettburgh with zip code 02647?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT owners.owner_id FROM owners
WHERE owners.zip_code = '02647' AND owners.first_name = 'Jaclyn' AND owners.email_address = 'hudson.favian@example.com' AND owners.street = '2635 Caitlyn Plains' AND owners.city = 'Barrettburgh' AND owners.last_name = 'Stoltenberg'
